hero.eyebrow: Christian Community Fellowship AOH Church of God
hero.heading: A place for worship, renewal, and real community
hero.tagline: Reviving faith · Restoring hope · Building community in Adamsville

office.hours: By appointment · Call or email anytime

about.heading: Rooted in faith. Open to every generation.
about.body1: Christian Community Fellowship AOH Church of God is a Christ-centered congregation committed to worship, discipleship, prayer, and service. We believe church should feel both sacred and welcoming, with room for families, visitors, and long-time members to grow together.
about.body2: Whether you are looking for a church home, returning to fellowship, or joining online, you are invited to worship with us and connect with our community.

schedule.note: Midweek connection and teaching are available online. Email the church to request the link.

leadership.name: Elder Dr. Leonard Bell II
leadership.bio: Christian Community Fellowship is led with a focus on biblical teaching, strong community, and pastoral care that meets people where they are.

announcements.title: Sunday Worship Experience
announcements.body: Gather with the church family for worship at 1:30 PM.

announcements.title: Midweek Bible Study
announcements.body: Join us online at 7:30 PM on Zoom. Email for the link.
